value.stringValue: An error has occurred, please get in touch with your consultant

fields.name: ShiftDetails_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Create New Shift

fields.name: When_did_the_shift_start
fields.fieldText: When did the shift start?

validationRule.errorMessage: You cannot create a shift for more than 2 weeks in the past

fields.name: When_did_the_shift_end
fields.fieldText: When did the shift end?

validationRule.errorMessage: Shift End must be ahead of the Shift Start time and be under 24 hours in length

value.stringValue: Which location did you work at?

fields.name: ShiftDetails_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Create New Shift

fields.name: ShiftDetails_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Create New Shift

fields.name: ErrorText
fields.fieldText: There are no available locations for you to create shifts against, please get in touch with your branch to get any missing hours added

fields.name: BreaksText
fields.fieldText:
Shift Breaks

Scheduled Date: {!Get_Shift.Start_Date_Time__c}

Scheduled Time: {!Get_Shift.Scheduled_Time__c}

Job: {!Get_Shift.Job_Category_Text__c}

Client: {!Get_Shift.Account__c}

fields.name: NoBreaks
fields.fieldText: No breaks found!

fields.name: CurrentBreak
fields.fieldText: Current Breaks

fields.name: BreakdefText
fields.fieldText: Breaks are centrally managed and cannot be added to this shift

fields.name: BreaksText_0
fields.fieldText:
Shift Breaks

Scheduled Date: {!Get_Shift.Start_Date_Time__c}

Scheduled Time: {!Get_Shift.Scheduled_Time__c}

Job: {!Get_Shift.Job_Category_Text__c}

Client: {!Get_Shift.Account__c}


Add Break

fields.name: Break_Length_Mins
fields.fieldText: Break Length (Mins)

fields.name: ShiftDetails_0
fields.fieldText:
Shift Cancellation

Scheduled Date: {!Get_Shift.Start_Date_Time__c}

Scheduled Time: {!Get_Shift.Scheduled_Time__c}

Job: {!Get_Shift.Job_Category_Text__c}

Client: {!Get_Shift.Account__c}


Important!

This action will remove the shift permanently with no option to undo

fields.name: ShiftDetails
fields.fieldText:
Shift Confirmation

Scheduled Date: {!Get_Shift.Start_Date_Time__c}

Scheduled Time: {!Get_Shift.Scheduled_Time__c}

Job: {!Get_Shift.Job_Category_Text__c}

Client: {!Get_Shift.Account__c}

fields.name: Hours_Confirmation
fields.fieldText: Do the times above match what you have worked?

fields.name: Actual_Start_Date_Time
fields.fieldText: Actual Start Date/Time

fields.name: Actual_End_Date_Time
fields.fieldText: Actual End Date/Time

fields.name: AllShifts
fields.fieldText:
Confirm All

Details on shifts to be confirmed:


{!ShiftText}

fields.name: ShiftDetails_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Edit Confirmed Hours

Job: {!Get_Shift.Job_Category_Text__c}

Client: {!Get_Shift.Account__c}

fields.name: Edited_Start
fields.fieldText: Confirmed Start Date/Time

fields.name: Edited_End
fields.fieldText: Confirmed End Date/Time

fields.name: ShiftDetails_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: My Shift Preferences

fields.name: PreviousShifts
fields.fieldText: How many days in the past do you want to see shifts for?

fields.name: FutureShifts
fields.fieldText: How many days in the future do you want to see shifts for?

textTemplates.name: CancelledBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Get_Site.Owner:User.FirstName},


The following shift has been cancelled by the candidate:

Candidate Name: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Contact__r.FirstName} {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Contact__r.LastName}

Site: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Site__r.Name}

Job Role: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Team__r.Name}

Start Date: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c}

End Date: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c}


Kind Regards

textTemplates.name: DeleteURL
textTemplates.text: Delete

textTemplates.name: LoopText
textTemplates.text:
Scheduled Date: {!Shift_Loop.Start_Date_Time__c}

Scheduled Time: {!Shift_Loop.Scheduled_Time__c}

Total Break (Mins): {!Shift_Loop.Break_from_Brekdef__c}

Job: {!Shift_Loop.Job_Category_Text__c}

Client: {!Shift_Loop.Account__c}
